name: visualq
description: Quality OS for coding agents — VRT, FRT, tracking proof, rolling health, PR gates via @visualq/mcp

VISUALQ_API_KEY.title: VisualQ Org Agent API Key

VISUALQ_DEFAULT_PROJECT.title: Default project slug
VISUALQ_DEFAULT_PROJECT.description: Optional — passed as VISUALQ_DEFAULT_PROJECT so tools inherit the project
